authors: Al-Kaisy A, Palmisani S, Smith TE, Pang D, Lam K, Burgoyne W, Houghton R, Hudson E, Lucas J
title: 10 kHz High-Frequency Spinal Cord Stimulation for Chronic Axial Low Back Pain in Patients With No History of Spinal Surgery
study_question: Does 10 kHz SCS improve chronic axial low back pain without prior spinal surgery?
population_assessed: Adults with chronic axial low back pain, no prior spinal surgery, unsuitable for surgery
outcome_measures: Back VAS, leg VAS, ODI, EQ-5D, SF-36, opioid use, sleep, work status
inclusion_criteria: Age 18-65, axial low back pain 6+ months, VAS 5+, surgery-naive, refractory, degenerative discs
answer_to_study_question: HF10 reduced pain, disability, opioid use, and improved quality of life over 12 months
